sourceTitle: Referencing guide at the University of Manchester: AI and referencing
evidenceSnippetOriginal: You must cite or acknowledge the outputs of generative A.I. tools when you use them in your work. Quotating, summarising and paraphrasing, editing, translating, data processing, re-writing your work and the generation of ideas.
evidenceLocator: Can I use an AI tool in my assignments? > You must cite or acknowledge
rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
